subcodes.first_line: O leaf afflicted by this great calamity, your lamentation and cry have so affected Abdul-Baha [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المبتلیه با المصیبه الکبری ناله و فغان شما عبدالبهاء را چنان
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @soul; spirit after death, @eulogies; reminiscences
